results.title: Friends of Crandall Library announce July art exhibit
results.description: The show will be on display at the library through July 31, with a reception tonight at 5 p.m.

results.title: Black Sabbath legend Bill Ward, 78, reveals he's mostly confined to a wheelchair a year after Ozzy Osbourne's death - The Sun
results.description: Black Sabbath legend Bill Ward, 78, reveals he's mostly confined to a wheelchair a year after Ozzy Osbourne's death The Sun “I’m just catching a ride, I’m not in retirement or ill or giving up”: Black Sabbath’s Bill Ward declares he’s “still a drummer” despite needing to use a wheelchair Louder Black Sabbath star admits health struggle as he vows to ‘keep rocking’ The Independent Black Sabbath star Bill Ward is in a wheelchair due to mobility issues Yahoo News UK Black Sabbath star Bill Ward in wheelchair due to mobility issues Female First
